codeReview.summary: The gateway test server now exposes /api/health without auth, protects /api/workspaces, and returns 404 for unknown workspace IDs on workspace-scoped routes. Tests cover health success, auth requirements, workspace listing, and the 404 workspace error case, matching the feature requirements.

summary: Pass: implementation and tests satisfy the health/workspaces endpoint behavior and workspace-not-found handling required by the feature.
